mapper.sql: select record.id as communicationId, 'record' as tabType, coalesce(student.student_name, concat('学员#', record.student_id)) as studentName, coalesce(record.contact_person, '系统记录') as recorderName, case lower(record.communication_method) when 'phone' then '电话' when 'wechat' then '微信' when 'email' then '邮件' when 'meeting' then '面谈' when 'in_person' then '面谈' else record.communication_method end as communicationMethod, date_format(record.communication_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as communicationTime, left(record.content, 60) as contentPreview, case record.status when 'completed' then '已完成' else '待跟进' end as followUpStatus, null as contactName, null as contactCompany, null as contactPosition, null as networkingType, null as statusLabel from networking_records record left join osg_student student on student.student_id = record.student_id where lower(record.communication_method) not in ('coffee chat', 'info session', 'referral', 'follow-up', 'follow_up')

select record.id as communicationId, 'networking' as tabType, coalesce(student.student_name, concat('学员#', record.student_id)) as studentName, null as recorderName, null as communicationMethod, date_format(record.communication_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as communicationTime, left(record.content, 60) as contentPreview, null as followUpStatus, record.contact_person as contactName, record.company as contactCompany, record.contact_level as contactPosition, case lower(record.communication_method) when 'coffee chat' then 'Coffee Chat' when 'info session' then 'Info Session' when 'follow_up' then 'Follow-up' when 'follow-up' then 'Follow-up' when 'referral' then 'Referral' else record.communication_method end as networkingType, case record.status when 'completed' then '已完成' else '跟进中' end as statusLabel from networking_records record left join osg_student student on student.student_id = record.student_id where lower(record.communication_method) in ('coffee chat', 'info session', 'referral', 'follow-up', 'follow_up')
mapper.select:
select * from (
) communication
and ( coalesce(studentName, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(recorderName, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(contactName, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(contactCompany, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(contactPosition, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by communicationTime desc, communicationId desc
